utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items by name. Each item is detailed with content and includes explicit cost information ('included in comprehensive plan at €1,240/month') or, in the case of total_budget, a full monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are present and fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan describes a 'comprehensive plan' including: (1) physical and mental health insurance with family therapy and executive health programs, (2) luxury property protection for €170,000, (3) executive business travel protection with global support, and (4) 24/7 emergency coordination, concierge, and priority claims processing. These descriptions align with the ideal top-rated options in the ground truth: EliteCare or PrimeCare Premium Plans for health (rating 10), EliteHome or PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property (rating 10), and EliteTravel or PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel (rating 10). The additional services such as 24/7 coordination, concierge, and priority claims correspond to 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 10), Concierge Services (rating 8), and Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10). Thus, each mapped component reflects the highest-quality match to the final plan’s wording and scope.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Physical and mental health insurance with executive health programs, family therapy, psychiatry services, and stress-related condition coverage - included in comprehensive plan at €1,240/month",
    "property_coverage": "Luxury items coverage, business equipment protection, and liability protection addressing the €170,000 property value need - included in comprehensive plan at €1,240/month", 
    "travel_coverage": "Executive business travel protection with medical evacuation, emergency coordination for weekly business travel globally - included in comprehensive plan at €1,240/month",
    "additional_services": "24/7 emergency coordination, global assistance, concierge services, priority claims processing - included in comprehensive plan at €1,240/month",
    "total_budget": "Monthly cost: €1,240 (Annual: €14,880) vs current €1,415/month (Annual: €16,980), Monthly savings: €175, Annual savings: €2,100, Implementation timeline: 1-5 days, Decision deadline: January 31, 2025"
